candidates.name: Email Thread Participation Graph
candidates.pitch: Visualizes reply chains as a graph showing who participated most and who got dropped. Sales teams juggle many threads and lose context. Gmail extension makes this native to workflow.
candidates.pain: Long email threads become confusing about who owes what action

candidates.name: LinkedIn Mutual Icebreaker Finder
candidates.pitch: Scrapes LinkedIn profiles for shared groups, schools, employers, and highlights warm intros. SDRs need personalization at scale. Competitors require manual browsing.
candidates.pain: Finding relevant mutual connections for outreach is manual and time-consuming

candidates.name: Conference Speaker Context Brief
candidates.pitch: Generates one-click briefs from speaker LinkedIn profiles and company pages before events. Sales teams lose deals by not knowing context. Events generate high-intent leads.
candidates.pain: Preparing for conference meetings requires hours of manual research

candidates.name: Calendar Event Tone Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Analyzes the language in calendar event descriptions to flag vague meetings, missing agendas, or aggressive tone. Professionals waste hours in low-value meetings. Simple NLP on title + description.
candidates.pain: Meeting invites lack clarity on urgency or desired outcomes

candidates.name: CSS Contrast Auditor
candidates.pitch: Overlays contrast ratio warnings directly on page elements with one-click fixes. Built as browser extension because CSS is already rendering there. Growing accessibility lawsuit risk makes this timely
candidates.pain: Checking WCAG contrast ratios requires switching to external tools or devtools

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Webhook Provider Fingerprinter
candidates.pitch: Pattern-matches webhook payloads against known provider signatures (Stripe, SendGrid, Twilio, etc). Extensions see raw requests so fingerprinting is trivial. Webhook debugging is a universal pain.
candidates.pain: Identifying which SaaS tool sent a webhook requires manual header inspection

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Page Interaction Replay Recorder
candidates.pitch: Records user interactions (clicks, scrolls, inputs) as a shareable JSON sequence. QA and support teams can replay bugs exactly. Lightweight alternative to full session recording tools.
candidates.pain: Recording bug reproduction steps requires screen recording or manual notes

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: SEO Meta Tag Comparator
candidates.pitch: Lets users compare meta titles, descriptions, and OG tags between any two URLs side-by-side. Marketers and SEOs need quick audits. Built-in competitor analysis fills a real gap.
candidates.pain: Comparing meta tags against competitors requires manual scraping
